name: ASRock B650M PG LIGHTNING WIFI Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 - Support DDR5-7200+(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 2 Type-C+A - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Phantom Gaming 2.5G LAN - 802.11ax WiFi 6E - Bluetooth
shortName: ASRock B650M PG LIGHTNING WIFI Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5
description: Micro-ATX gaming motherboard for AM5 with PCIe 4.0, DDR5 support, and WiFi 6E connectivity.
